title: Nominee Chief Accountant
metaDescription: Nominee chief accountant services in Vietnam — meet the mandatory requirement for non-micro-enterprises with a qualified professional handling tax compliance, financial reporting and audits.

hero.title: Nominee Chief Accountant Services in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: Chief accountants are mandatory for non-micro-enterprises in Vietnam, handling tax compliance, financial reporting, audits and liaising with the tax authorities.

sections.heading: Meet Vietnam's chief accountant requirement
body: Vietnamese law requires non-micro-enterprises to appoint a qualified chief accountant to oversee critical financial responsibilities and ensure regulatory adherence.
InCorp Vietnam provides a nominee chief accountant so you can satisfy this requirement immediately — without the cost and complexity of recruiting a full-time hire.

items.title: Chief accountant dossier
items.desc: We coordinate with your team, state authorities and banks to assign a chief accountant and establish business bank accounts.

items.title: Ongoing representation
items.desc: Signing accounting reports, financial statements, tax filings and Power of Attorney documentation as required.

sections.heading: Key benefits
items: Minimizes legal risks and compliance fines
Enables strategic tax optimization within the law
Ensures accurate financial reporting for informed decision-making

items.q: How much does the service cost?
items.a: Cost depends on your business requirements, including the types and frequency of reports involved. We tailor a quote to your needs.

items.q: Is this suitable for my company size?
items.a: Yes. The service works for large, medium and small enterprises that fall outside the micro-enterprise threshold.
Submit an inquiry with your company details and we will prepare a customized solution for you.

sections.title: Stay compliant with a nominee chief accountant
sections.subtitle: Satisfy Vietnam's statutory requirement with a qualified professional on your side.
